---
name: Feature request
about: New feature, enhancement, or research workflow
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want to do
The research workflow you're trying to support, in one sentence.

## Why the current PVL flow doesn't fit
Where the current UI/API forces you to give up or paste into another tool.

## Proposed behaviour
What the UI / API would look like if this shipped. Mockups, sketches, or paste-ready text.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Tier guess (helps prioritization, see `docs/active/BACKLOG.md`)
- [ ] Tier 1 — high-impact, well-scoped, < 1 week
- [ ] Tier 2 — production scale (queue, observability, auth)
- [ ] Tier 3 — research velocity (multi-predictor, RAG, CLI)
- [ ] Tier 4 — quality + housekeeping

## Related issues / docs
Links to existing PVL specs, prior PRs, or upstream papers.
